normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Policy 2.26 - Tree Retention
scope_summary: Regulates tree-damaging activity to 'regulated trees' within the City of Fremantle, requiring development approval for removal or substantial damage except in listed exempt circumstances. Applies to all lots within a Development Area, land zoned Industrial, or land coded R30 and below under Local Planning Scheme No. 4, covering development applications, subdivision applications and strategic planning proposals. Sets assessment criteria, arborist report triggers, and replacement-planting requirements where removal is approved.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: living tree qualifying as regulated tree
living tree qualifying as regulated tree (average canopy diameter)
lots within LPS4 area to which the policy applies (plus Development Areas and Industrial zones)
regulated trees on neighbouring properties within 5m of the development footprint
replacement planting per regulated tree removed
each replacement tree planted in-ground within the lot

quality_flags: Source document cites the development-exemptions policy as 'LPP 1.6' but Fremantle's current exemptions policy is numbered LPP 1.7 (FRE-LPP-004); reference mapped on subject match - likely an outdated internal citation in the source PDF
